title: Write an allow_via_registry helper for a Registry-registered worker
prompt: Write `test/support/sandbox_registry_helpers.ex` with `allow_via_registry/2` taking `(registry, name)`. It must: (1) call `Registry.lookup(registry, name)` to find the pid for the given name, (2) extract the first pid from the result list (the format is `[{pid, _}]`), (3) call `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.allow(MyApp.Repo, self(), pid)`, (4) return `:ok`. Include error handling for the empty-lookup case.
tier_rationale: Composes Registry.lookup with allow/3 and handles the lookup return shape.
